post.description: Creates a new transaction order for EVM-compatible multisig wallet (GnosisSafe). Order requires threshold signatures before execution. Supports ETH/token transfers and contract calls.

403.description: User is not an owner of the multisig or missing permission

post.description: Creates a new transaction order for Solana Squads multisig. Returns transaction parameters for signing. Supports SOL/SPL token transfers.

200.description: Order created successfully with Solana params

403.description: User is not an owner of the multisig or missing permission

post.description: Activates a previously created Solana order in the Squads multisig. Required step after order creation before it can be signed by other owners.
Creates a new transaction order for Bitcoin P2WSH multisig wallet. Returns PSBT (Partially Signed Bitcoin Transaction) for signing by multisig owners.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or insufficient balance

403.description: User is not an owner of the multisig

post.description: Creates a new transaction order for Cardano native script multisig wallet. Returns transaction body hash for signing. Supports ADA and native asset transfers.

200.description: Order created successfully with tx body

400.description: Invalid request parameters or insufficient balance

403.description: User is not an owner of the multisig

get.description: Retrieves all UTXOs and network status for a specific ADA address and chain.
get.summary: Get ADA UTXOs by address and chainId

post.description: Broadcasts a signed ADA transaction hex to the blockchain using Blockfrost.
Adds a signature (VkeyWitness) to a Cardano multisig order. The signature is created off-chain using CardanoWasm.make_vkey_witness with the txBodyHash.

403.description: User is not an owner of the multisig

post.description: Creates a new transaction order for Tron multisig wallet. Supports TRX and TRC20 token transfers. Returns transaction parameters for signing.

403.description: User is not an owner of the multisig or missing permission

get.description: Retrieves transaction parameters for a Solana order. Returns data needed for signing the transaction in Squads multisig.
Retrieves the raw Tron transaction for signing. Returns transaction object ready for wallet signing.
Retrieves the raw XRP transaction for signing. Returns transaction object ready for wallet signing.

post.description: Deactivates an order without rejecting it. Deactivated orders cannot be signed or executed but remain in history.
Adds user signature to an EVM order. Signature must be in GnosisSafe format. When threshold is reached, order status changes to "ready".
Submits a signed Solana transaction to the Squads multisig. Approves the proposal in the multisig program.
Rejects a Solana order in the Squads multisig. Adds rejection vote to the proposal.
Adds partial signature to Bitcoin PSBT. Each owner signs with their key share. When threshold is reached, PSBT can be finalized.
Adds signature to a Tron multisig transaction. When threshold is reached, transaction can be executed.
Rejects an EVM order. When rejection threshold is reached, order cannot be executed.
Rejects a Bitcoin order. The order will be marked as rejected and cannot be executed.
Rejects a Cardano order. The order will be marked as rejected and cannot be executed.
Rejects a Tron order. The order will be marked as rejected and cannot be executed.
Rejects an XRP order. The order will be marked as rejected and cannot be executed.
Broadcasts the fully signed EVM transaction to the blockchain. Requires threshold signatures. Status changes to "execution" then "executed" after confirmation.

400.description: Order not ready for execution (insufficient signatures)

patch.description: Executes the Solana transaction after threshold approvals in Squads. Broadcasts transaction to Solana network.
Finalizes and broadcasts the Bitcoin PSBT after all required signatures. Transaction is sent to Bitcoin network.
Assembles and broadcasts the fully signed Cardano transaction. Requires threshold signatures collected via sign/ada endpoint.
Broadcasts the fully signed Tron transaction to the blockchain. Requires threshold signatures.

post.description: Creates a new transaction order for XRP multisig wallet. Supports XRP and issued currency transfers. Returns transaction parameters for signing.

403.description: User is not an owner of the multisig or missing permission

post.description: Adds signature to an XRP multisig transaction. Signatures are sorted alphabetically by Account. When threshold is reached, transaction can be executed.

patch.description: Submits the fully signed XRP multisig transaction to the ledger. Requires threshold signatures.

get.description: Retrieves all orders (transactions) for a specific multisig wallet with pagination. Includes pending, executed, and rejected orders.

delete.description: Deletes an order. Only orders with status "created" can be deleted. Executed or in-progress orders cannot be deleted.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific order including signatures, status, and transaction parameters.
Retrieves all multisig wallets where the user is an owner for a specific wallet address and chain type. Returns multisigs with token balances.
Retrieves all multisig wallets for the current user filtered by chain type. Returns multisigs with token balances.
get.summary: Get user multisigs by chain type

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific multisig by its address. Returns owners, threshold, deployment status, and token balances.

post.description: Broadcasts the signed deployment transaction for a GnosisSafe multisig. After execution, the multisig address becomes active on the blockchain.

patch.description: Activates a Tron multisig by broadcasting the deployment transaction. Requires co-signer confirmation.

post.description: Creates a new GnosisSafe multisig wallet. Returns deployment data that must be signed and broadcast using execute/evm endpoint.
Creates a new Tron multisig wallet. Requires key shares from all owners for activation.
Adds a key share for Tron multisig activation. All owners must share their keys for the multisig to become active.
Adds a key share for XRP multisig activation. All owners must share their keys for the multisig to become active.
Retrieves the recovery key share for Solana multisig deployment. Required for client-side transaction construction.
Creates a new XRP multisig wallet using native SignerList. Returns wallet data that must be funded (min 1.2 XRP) and activated using execute/xrp endpoint.

patch.description: Activates a XRP multisig by broadcasting the deployment transaction. Requires co-signer confirmation.

post.description: Creates a new Solana Squads multisig wallet. After creation, use sol/tx/deploy to get the deployment transaction.
Creates a new Bitcoin P2WSH multisig wallet. Requires public keys from all owners. Wallet is immediately active after creation.
Creates a new Cardano native script-based M-of-N multisig wallet. Wallet is immediately active after creation.
Generates the deployment transaction for a Solana Squads multisig. Must be signed by the payer wallet and submitted via sol/deploy.
Broadcasts the signed deployment transaction to Solana network. Activates the Squads multisig on-chain.

delete.description: Deletes a multisig from the system. Only non-deployed multisigs can be deleted. Deployed multisigs must be managed on-chain.

post.description: Updates the display name of a multisig wallet. Only affects local storage, not blockchain data.

get.description: Retrieves all MPC wallets for the current user across all chains. Returns wallets without pagination.
Retrieves MPC wallets for the current user with pagination support. Returns wallet details including chains, balances, and names.
Returns the total USD value of all assets across all user wallets and multisigs.
Retrieves list of supported tokens for a specific chain. Includes token address, symbol, name, decimals, and logo. Supports search and pagination.

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Chain ID (e.g., 1 for Ethereum, 56 for BSC)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by token name or symbol

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of tokens.

401.description: Unauthorized. Requires a valid user session.

get.description: Retrieves the encrypted client-side key share for wallet recovery. Used for MPC wallet reconstruction.

parameters.name: isExport
parameters.description: Set to "true" when requesting share for private key export

get.description: Retrieves the encrypted server-side key share. Used together with client share for transaction signing.

parameters.name: isExport
parameters.description: Set to "true" when requesting share for private key export

post.description: Updates the encrypted key shares for an MPC wallet. Used for key rotation or recovery scenarios.
Updates the display name for a wallet. Only affects local storage.

get.description: Returns the server RSA public key used for encrypting wallet recovery data.
Returns all token balances with USD values for a specific wallet. Includes native and ERC20/SPL tokens.

post.description: Returns portfolios for multiple wallets in a single request. Optimized for fetching all user wallets at once.
Returns current USD prices for specified tokens. Cached for performance.

get.description: Returns whether private key export (share reconstruction) is enabled.
get.summary: Check if private key export is allowed

get.description: Returns whether wallet import via private key is enabled.
get.summary: Check if private key import is allowed

post.description: Creates a new MPC wallet. Stores encrypted key shares for the server and client. Wallet is immediately usable after creation.

delete.description: Deletes a wallet and removes all associated key shares. This action is irreversible.

get.description: Returns all, locked, and free UTXOs for a Cardano or Bitcoin wallet address. Locked UTXOs are tied to pending/processing multisig orders.

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Chain ID (e.g., ada_mainnet, ada_preprod, BTC, BTC_T3)

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific wallet by its address. Returns wallet data including chain type, name, and creation date.
Retrieves combined transaction history for all multisig wallets the user has access to. Includes orders, transfers, and settings changes. Supports filtering by status and pagination.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter by status: ALL, PENDING, EXECUTED, REJECTED

get.description: Retrieves transaction history for a specific multisig wallet. Returns orders and incoming/outgoing transfers with pagination.
Retrieves transaction history for a regular (non-multisig) wallet. Returns incoming and outgoing transfers with token information.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by address type (CEX or Wallet)

200.description: Address type (CEX or Wallet), or null if not found

get.description: Returns the active organization for the API key caller: name, role, and memberId.
Lists organization members. Master only.

post.description: Email invitation to join the organization. Master only.
Grant employee access to an org wallet. Master only.
Store provisioned employee share blobs. Master only. Use sdk.provisionOrgMemberWalletAccess().

delete.description: Removes an employee and triggers cascading cleanup: wallet assignments, MPC shares, multisig signatures, and sessions. Master only. Requires TeamManagement API key permission.
Revokes employee access to an org wallet or vault. Triggers server-side share cleanup. Master only. Requires WalletManagement API key permission.

post.description: Employee accepts provisioned wallet access. Use sdk.acceptOrgWalletAccessWithPassword().

bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using Bearer scheme

isTwoFA.description: Whether 2FA is set up (based on twoFASecret existence)

isTwoFABinded.description: Whether 2FA is bound (based on isTwoFABinded flag)

force2FA.description: Whether 2FA is required for write operations (based on FORCE_2FA env)

pkImportEnabled.description: Whether private key import is enabled

pkExportEnabled.description: Whether private key export is enabled

qr.description: QR URL for binding user Google Authenticator

code.description: QR code for binding user Google Authenticator

needOTP.description: The response indicates that the user is already registered and needs to enter the OTP

address.description: Wallet address of the user in string format.

share.description: Part of the private key, represented as a string.

newPassword.description: The new password for the user (at least 8 chars, 1 upper, 1 lower, 1 number, 1 symbol)

oldPassword.description: The current password for the user

currentPassword.description: The current password for the user

oobCode.description: The out-of-band code from the email verification link
The out-of-band code sent by Firebase to the user email

newPassword.description: The new password for the user (at least 8 chars, 1 upper, 1 lower, 1 number, 1 symbol)

to.description: Target EVM address for the transaction

value.description: Value of the transaction in wei

actions.description: Order Actions. If the array is larger than 1 element, then a multisend contract will be used to form the th order.

logoURL.description: URL to the token logo image

operation.description: Operation type (0 = CALL, 1 = DELEGATE_CALL). For multiSend operations the value should be 1, otherwise 0. Necessary for the logic of transferring the call to the contract

safeTxGas.description: Amount of gas to be used by the Safe transaction.

baseGas.description: Additional gas costs (e.g. base gas for data used).

gasPrice.description: Gas price in wei used for the Safe transaction.

gasToken.description: Token address used to pay for gas. Zero address means native currency.

refundReceiver.description: Address that receives gas fee refunds.

feeSats.description: The amount of fees (sats) included in the order transaction

executer.description: Wallet executer address who executed the order transaction.

signedHash.description: The result is a signature with the user private key converted via GnosisAdjustVInSignature

status.description: Status of the signature (e.g., signed, rejected)

walletExecution.description: Wallet address that executed the order

multisigId.description: ID of the associated multisig wallet

value.description: Amount of ETH or token to be sent (as a stringified number)

operation.description: Type of transaction operation (0 = CALL, 1 = DELEGATECALL)

version.description: Version of the signed order. If outdated data is signed, it will be necessary to re-sign.

hashToSing.description: Hash to be signed for this order

signature.description: Signature of the transaction if available

status.description: Status of the order (e.g., created, ready, execution)

signatures.description: List of signatures attached to the order

witnessHex.description: Vkey witness in hex format (from CardanoWasm.make_vkey_witness)

keyHashHex.description: Ed25519 key hash of the signer (hex)

expireTime.description: The time when the transaction will expire. This is the time from the first order signature + 23:50H

version.description: Version of the signed order. If outdated data is signed, it will be necessary to re-sign.

transaction.description: Transaction data. Created after the first signature (Status Pendign) and valid for 24 hours.

lastLedgerSequence.description: LastLedgerSequence - ledger index after which transaction expires

expireTime.description: The time when the transaction will expire.

signedHash.description: The result is a signature with the user private key converted via GnosisAdjustVInSignature

version.description: Version of the signed order. If outdated data is signed, it will be necessary to re-sign.
Version of the signed order. If outdated data is signed, it will be necessary to re-sign.

nativeScriptHex.description: Serialized native script for M-of-N multisig

reserveInfo.description: XRP reserve information (only present after account activation)

multisigId.description: ID of the associated multisig wallet

value.description: Amount of ETH or token to be sent (as a stringified number)

operation.description: Type of transaction operation (0 = CALL, 1 = DELEGATECALL)

version.description: Version of the signed order. If outdated data is signed, it will be necessary to re-sign.

hashToSing.description: Hash to be signed for this order

signature.description: Signature of the transaction if available

status.description: Status of the order (e.g., created, ready, execution)

signatures.description: List of signatures attached to the order

isLastTx.description: An identifier indicating whether this is the last multisig order. This is necessary for the EVM network, as it only allows sequential deletion from the end.

isSmallestNonce.description: Is order has the smallest nonce in multisig

multisigId.description: ID of the associated multisig wallet

value.description: Amount of ETH or token to be sent (as a stringified number)

operation.description: Type of transaction operation (0 = CALL, 1 = DELEGATECALL)

version.description: Version of the signed order. If outdated data is signed, it will be necessary to re-sign.

hashToSing.description: Hash to be signed for this order

signature.description: Signature of the transaction if available

status.description: Status of the order (e.g., created, ready, execution)

signatures.description: List of signatures attached to the order

isLastTx.description: An identifier indicating whether this is the last multisig order. This is necessary for the EVM network, as it only allows sequential deletion from the end.

isSmallestNonce.description: Is order has the smallest nonce in multisig

isGroup.description: Is multisig has orders with same nonce

group.description: Orders with same nonce in multisig

order.description: Multisig created order history item with full multisig details

logoURL.description: URL to the token logo image

decimals.description: Number of decimals the token uses

balanceUSD.description: Token amount in USD on balance

address.description: Ethereum address of the token contract

transaction.description: Multisig activation tranaction (updateAccountPermissions). e.g. result from tronWeb.trx.sign(unsignedUpdateTx, accountPrivateKey)

owners.description: List of user TRON wallet addresses
List of user XRP wallet addresses (signers)

signerListSetTxBlob.description: Signed SignerListSet transaction blob (hex). This transaction sets up the signer list.

disableMasterKeyTxBlob.description: Signed AccountSet transaction blob (hex) to disable master key (SetFlag=4). This must have Sequence = SignerListSet.Sequence + 1
Signed AccountSet transaction blob (hex) to disable master key (SetFlag=4).

total.description: Total number of wallets for the user

totalAssetValueUSD.description: The total aggregate USD value across all user wallets and tokens, fetched from the database.

symbol.description: The token symbol used across the blockchain.

logoUrl.description: URL to the token logo image.

address.description: Contract address of the token. Null for native tokens.

mcap.description: Market capitalization of the token in USD.

tokens.description: List of blockchain tokens supported by the system.

force.description: Force refresh all wallets from blockchain API

wallets.description: List of wallets for creating shares on the backend

value.description: Value as string (lovelace for ADA, satoshis for BTC)

totalValue.description: Sum of all UTXOs (lovelace for ADA, satoshis for BTC)

address.description: The public address of the wallet.

chain.description: The type of blockchain the wallet belongs to.

isImported.description: Indicates if the wallet was imported by the user.

name.description: Custom name assigned to the wallet.

share.description: Placeholder for the recovery share status.

total.description: Total number of orders and transactions combined

filter.description: Status filter applied to activity history

value.description: Amount of ETH (in wei) to send

data.description: Hex-encoded data payload for the transaction

safeTxGas.description: Gas limit for the Safe transaction

gasToken.description: Token address used to pay for gas (use 0x0 for ETH)

refundReceiver.description: Address that will receive gas refund (if any)

total.description: Total number of orders and transactions combined

id.description: Unique identifier of the audit log entry

date.description: Date and time when the event occurred (ISO 8601 format)

ipAddress.description: IP address from which the event was performed

total.description: Total number of audit log entries matching the filter

prefix.description: Prefix for the API key to identify it in UI

id.description: The unique identifier of the API key

permissions.description: Permissions associated with the API key

isEnabled.description: Whether the API key is enabled

requestCount.description: Total number of requests made with this key

lastUsedAt.description: Date of the last request made with this key

rateLimit.description: Rate limit for this key (requests per minute)

createdAt.description: The date and time when the API key was created

rawKey.description: The raw API key — shown only once at creation time

id.description: The unique identifier of the API key

permissions.description: Permissions associated with the API key

isEnabled.description: Whether the API key is enabled

requestCount.description: Total number of requests made with this key

lastUsedAt.description: Date of the last request made with this key

rateLimit.description: Rate limit for this key (requests per minute)

createdAt.description: The date and time when the API key was created

name.description: New name for the API key

isEnabled.description: Whether the API key should be enabled or disabled

name.description: Name for the address book entry
New name for the address book entry

isInAddressBook.description: Whether the address exists in the current user address book

isOnlyExist.description: Allow only addresses from address book
